how_it_works: Endgame bosses guard key content milestones. Each has distinct mechanics that reward preparation. Elder/Shaper Guardians drop their respective fragments. Conquerors drop Watchstones and eventually Sirus. Maven Invitations require witnessing multiple bosses.
tips: Most deaths to map bosses come from unrecognised telegraphs — reading the mechanic once saves more runs than one extra DPS node.
Conqueror order matters: kill in the same region multiple times to force the Conqueror encounter.
Sirus, Awakener of Worlds has a soft DPS check — his rotating beams reset if you take too long on each phase.

bosses.name: Guardian of the Chimera
bosses.key_mechanics: Three-phase with adds: Gorilla adds (stun), Rhino ads (charge), Spider adds (chaos ground). Chimera teleports between phases.
dangerous_abilities: Chaos smoke clouds on ground (deal large chaos damage)
Adds overwhelm if DPS is low
bosses.recommended_prep: Chaos resistance is important. Clear adds quickly before they stack up. Use movement skill to dodge leap slam.
bosses.notes: Considered the hardest Shaper Guardian due to chaos clouds. Bring flasks to counter chaos damage.

bosses.name: Guardian of the Hydra
bosses.key_mechanics: Ice storm barrage, homing missiles, and tentacle slap. Second phase (50% life) adds ice novas.
bosses.recommended_prep: High cold resistance and freeze immunity (from Pantheon or boots). Movement skill to sidestep missile salvos.
bosses.notes: Hydra is often the easiest Shaper Guardian. Cold resist cap is the main preparation needed.

bosses.name: Guardian of the Minotaur
bosses.key_mechanics: Underground dig phase (untargetable), boulder rolls, and slam. Boulders create ground patches on impact.
bosses.recommended_prep: High physical mitigation (armour or end charges). Run when boulders start rolling. Move during underground phase.
bosses.notes: Watch for the dig animation — stand away from the nearest boulder trail direction. Pure physical damage makes armour/endurance charges very effective.

bosses.name: Guardian of the Phoenix
bosses.key_mechanics: Fire-based: raining fireballs, fire nova, and periodic resurrection mechanic (regains life if not killed within window).
dangerous_abilities: Rain of fire from above (high fire damage)
bosses.recommended_prep: Fire resistance cap. Freeze immunity. High burst damage to kill through the regen shield phase.
bosses.notes: The regen window requires high burst DPS — if your damage is too low, Phoenix will fully restore life. Ensure flask charges are saved for this phase.

bosses.name: The Constrictor
bosses.map: Absence of Mercy and Empathy (Shaper's Realm variant)
bosses.key_mechanics: Chaos-themed: chaos puddles on ground, tentacle slam, and periodic Elder realm overlay (changes floor layout).
bosses.recommended_prep: Chaos resistance is crucial. Movement speed and quick reflexes to avoid puddles. Chaos immunity makes the fight trivial.
bosses.notes: The chaos puddle denial mechanic punishes stationary builds. Keep moving constantly during the fight.

bosses.name: The Enslaver
bosses.key_mechanics: Fire-based Elder Guardian: fire balls, fire ground, and whirlwind spin that creates fire patches.
bosses.recommended_prep: Fire resistance cap. Freeze immunity (Pantheon). Movement skill to exit fire ground zones.
bosses.notes: Similar feel to Phoenix — fire is the primary threat. Ground fire patches can stack quickly in a small arena.

bosses.name: The Eradicator
bosses.key_mechanics: Lightning-based Elder Guardian: ball lightning, arc, and energy blade slices. Very fast projectiles.
dangerous_abilities: Ball lightning walls (can hit many times)
bosses.recommended_prep: Lightning resistance cap. Dodge or Evade to avoid blade hits. Consider Vaal Grace for dodge chance.
bosses.notes: The lightning blades home in and can be hard to dodge without movement speed. Keeping distance reduces the number of simultaneous threats.

bosses.name: The Purifier
bosses.key_mechanics: Cold-based Elder Guardian: ice spears, frost nova, and cold ground patches. Periodic freeze attempt.
bosses.recommended_prep: Cold resistance cap. Freeze immunity (Pantheon or Boots). Move perpendicular to ice spear direction.
bosses.notes: Freeze immunity makes this fight straightforward. The ice spears fire in a predictable arc pattern — side-step timing is learnable quickly.

bosses.name: Baran, the Crusader
bosses.key_mechanics: Lightning and spell-based: lightning beam, mana drain, and Crusader decree (random map modifier). Arena slowly fills with lightning.
dangerous_abilities: Mana drain nova (drains flask and mana)
bosses.recommended_prep: Lightning resistance. Mana flasks or Blood Magic to avoid mana drain. Dodge the rotating lightning beam.
bosses.notes: Baran's mana drain can strand mana-dependent builds. Blood Magic or high mana pool helps. The arena shrinks over time — focus on DPS.

bosses.name: Veritania, the Redeemer
bosses.key_mechanics: Cold and speed-based: cold snap, ice storm, and rush charges across the arena. Periodic invulnerability phases.
dangerous_abilities: Cold snap freeze (can one-shot cold builds without freeze immunity)
Periodic invulnerability + ice storm while immune
bosses.recommended_prep: Cold resistance cap. Freeze immunity mandatory. Movement skill to dodge rush path.
bosses.notes: Freeze immunity is the number one priority for this fight. Without it, cold snap can instakill. Her invulnerability phases have predictable timing.

bosses.name: Al-Hezmin, the Hunter
bosses.key_mechanics: Chaos and poison-based: snake adds, poison nova, and chaos cloud spit. Snake adds can overwhelm with low DPS.
bosses.recommended_prep: Chaos resistance cap and Immunity (if possible). Clear snake adds immediately. Antidote or Sulphur flask to counter poison stacks.
bosses.notes: The most chaos-damage-heavy Conqueror. Chaos resistance is more important here than for the other three. Maintain flask charges for the nova.

bosses.name: Drox, the Warlord
bosses.key_mechanics: Physical and bleed-based: slam, leap slam, and whirlwind. Arena adds bleed ground zones. Rage mechanic: Drox enrages if you don't deal enough DPS.
dangerous_abilities: Enrage phase (damage spike if DPS is too low)
bosses.recommended_prep: Armour, endurance charges, or high evasion. Bleed immunity or instant remove bleed flask. Maintain steady DPS to avoid enrage.
bosses.notes: Drox's enrage is a soft DPS check. Any bleed or physical build removal flask is highly recommended. Armour reduces slam damage significantly.

bosses.name: Sirus, Awakener of Worlds
bosses.map: Eye of the Storm (T16, Atlas centre)
bosses.key_mechanics: Four-phase pinnacle fight. Each phase adds mechanics. Phase 3+ adds rotating death beams. Final phase: Meteor shower + die beam + Corridor of Degen.
bosses.recommended_prep: Fast movement speed to dodge beams. Strong single-target DPS (phases go faster). Freeze or stun immunity. Keep portals open between phases.
bosses.notes: Sirus has a DPS check in phase 4 — low damage makes the meteor and beam overlap lethal. Run toward the edge of the arena to find gaps in beam patterns. Never stand in clouds.

bosses.name: The Maven
bosses.map: The Maven's Crucible (after completing Maven Invitations)
bosses.key_mechanics: Memory game phase, add phases, and continuous environmental hazard creation. The Memory Game has instant-death consequence.
bosses.recommended_prep: Strong AoE clear for add phase. Very high DPS for enrage check. Careful spatial awareness for memory game pattern.
bosses.notes: The memory game is a 3-safe-zone pattern you must memorise in seconds. The add phase requires either AOE dominance or excellent positioning. High investment fight.

bosses.name: The Shaper
bosses.key_mechanics: Ball lightning, slam, and three mini-boss phases. Zana portals must be entered for safe DPS windows.
dangerous_abilities: Bullet hell cold projectiles in phase portals
bosses.recommended_prep: Cold and lightning resistance. Dodge flasks or Acrobatics. Potion charges to survive portal phases. Strong single-target DPS.
bosses.notes: Shaper is one of the original pinnacle bosses — his mechanics are learnable but punishing. The bullet hell portal phase requires good movement. Save flasks for the DPS windows.

bosses.name: The Elder
bosses.map: Requires Shaper and Elder present simultaneously on Atlas (complex setup)
bosses.key_mechanics: Elder spawns with four Guardian adds simultaneously. Periodic slam and ground-degen. Guardians assist Elder and must be managed.
bosses.recommended_prep: Kill Guardians quickly to reduce simultaneous threats. Chaos and cold resistance. High clear speed to manage add pressure.
bosses.notes: The Elder fight requires managing 4 mini-bosses at once. Prioritise the most dangerous Guardian (Constrictor for chaos damage) first. Area of the map matters — arena can be tight.
